title: Truck overturns on N2, lands in Knysna Lagoon
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A truck left the road on the...
bodyText:
KNYSNA NEWS - A truck left the road on the N2 (Knysna Lagoon) earlier this morning, Wednesday 20 November.


> According to information gathered on the scene, the driver was the only person in the vehicle and he has already been taken to hospital.


The nature of his injuries is unknown at this stage.

More information will follow as soon as it becomes available.

Motorists are being advised to be patient on this road as the recovery operation may take a while.

Read more and see a video on www.knysnaplettherald.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
